items.name: markfulton/claude-antigravity-agents
items.full_text: A Claude Code skill that delegates coding, review, analysis, and research jobs to Google Antigravity CLI (agy) sub-agents — save tokens, use a second model, work in parallel.

items.name: gnomeria/usbtree
items.full_text: Live USB device tree in your terminal. Rust TUI, no root, no libusb. Full activity metrics on Linux; device tree on macOS/Windows.

items.name: AlayaLab/AlayaWorld
items.full_text: Full-stack open-source interactive long-horizon world model.
